dominants.dominant_desc:
1. Farm first: Ling is insanely item-dependent, so it's very important to get first two damage items as fast as possible. 

2. Don't ult immediately: save it for the right moment, remember the ultimate has like 45 sec cooldown.

3. Use in-game communication: sometimes your team doesn't understand what you want to do and whether or not you have the opportunity to join a fight. Use short commands and share your ult CD for better clarity.

4. In team fights DON'T RUSH, let your teammates absorb major CC skills first, be like a snake 🐍

✪ "Wall boost": while in ultimate, releasing your 2nd skill slightly into the wall will make your whole combo faster.

✪ Bushes spots: there are many places on the map where you can be on the wall and in the bush at the same time.

✪ Wave management: pay attention to minion waves after 5 minutes of the match (especially on EXP lane); clearing them gives Ling an underrated boost in gold.

✪ Lane cut: if you left alone to defend your base without an inhibitor turret, your last chance would be cutting Mid lane minions before they come close to your base. Enemy can not destroy base without minions.

emblems.emblem_desc:
For me the choice is between Killing Spree and Quantum Charge, these two are the most suitable for Ling.

Although the most hyped one is War Cry, it doesn't really help you with early game, for example you have 100 damage, adding +8% from War Cry passive it'll be 108, wow, you wouldn't even notice it.

equips.equip_desc: Last item is always optional, you're free to switch Malefic Roar to Immortality, Rose Gold Meteor or even Great Dragon Spear.
You should use this build against tanky or high lifesteal enemies.
Corrosion Scythe can be used for faster push, it also adds some DPS and outplay potential (surprise value).

Usually this slot is ignored due to its unreliability and inefficiency in Late game. 

You'll notice that all the builds I've listed include Berserker's Fury as the first item, and that's no coincidence. There are items that are important, appropriate or situational, and then there's Berserker's Fury, which is an absolute must-have. So there's no point in delaying it.

hero.hero_overview:
I'm S38 Global 4 Ling, and here's my build and emblems.

Additionally, I tried to mention all key things that I know about the hero.
hero.hero_strength:
- Mobility privilege: 1st skill allows you to rotate fast and run away from danger.
- Targeting squishy heroes: Ling has easy access to backline in team fights.
- Objectives control: good at pushing turrets and stealing objectives like turtles and Lord.
- Invincibility: 3rd skill (ultimate) makes Ling basically immune to anything. If timed correctly, you can even dodge Franco or Saber ults.
- Late game potential: while there are better scaling junglers in the game, Ling is still strong if you aim for late game.
hero.hero_weakness:
- Difficulty: Ling is one of the hardest heroes to master.
- Weak early game: very very bad against early invades in jungle.
- No burst damage: you can rarely get a solo kill without gold advantage, because Ling has no burst damage in his skill set.
- Blue buff dependency: without a blue buff Ling is very limited.
- Team reliant: you rely entirely on your team when it comes to initiating a team fight or zoning enemies.
- Broken Walls map: it's a rare occasion when a map variation negatively impacts hero's performance.

hero.hero_overview: Ling once belonged to the Finch Sect, a mysterious and feared order of assassins from the Cadia Riverlands. During a mission, he nearly lost his life but was saved by the Vermilion Bird; it was an encounter that would kindle his yearning for freedom. In a bargain to leave the Finch Sect, he undertook one last mission to infiltrate the Dragon Altar.
hero.hero_strength:
Extreme Mobility:
Ling can jump between walls using his passive and Finch Poise, allowing him to move quickly across the map and escape danger easily.
High Burst Damage:
His skill combo, especially with Defiant Sword and Tempest of Blades, can quickly eliminate squishy heroes (e.g., marksmen or mages).
Excellent Split-Pusher:
Because of his mobility, Ling can easily push lanes and rotate for objectives or pickoffs.
Invincibility in Ultimate:
Tempest of Blades gives Ling temporary invincibility, letting him avoid enemy ultimates or deadly combos.
Snowball Potential:
Once fed, Ling becomes incredibly hard to stop and can dominate the game with aggressive map control.
hero.hero_weakness:
Energy Dependency:
Ling uses energy instead of mana. Poor energy management can leave him vulnerable and unable to use skills.
Squishy:
He has low durability and can be easily killed if caught or crowd-controlled.
Hard to Master:
His wall-climbing mechanic and energy management require good timing and map awareness, making him hard for beginners.
Vulnerable to Crowd Control (CC):
Ling is easily shut down by heroes with strong CC (e.g., Chou, Ruby, Khufra).
Item Dependent:
He needs his core items (like Berserker's Fury, Endless Battle) to deal serious damage. If he's behind, he struggles to catch up.

spell.spell_desc:
Faster Farming = Faster Power Spike
Ling relies heavily on gold and items to become effective. Retribution speeds up jungle clearing, helping him get key items like:

Endless Battle
Berserker's Fury
Blade of the Heptaseas
This gives Ling a quicker damage spike and better map control.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ling synergizes well with Angela because her ultimate, Heartguard, provides shields and movement speed, allowing Ling to engage fights more aggressively and escape dangerous situations.

counters.counter_desc: Khufra is a strong counter to Ling due to his Bouncing Ball skill, which prevents Ling from using his wall-climbing mobility, making it difficult for Ling to escape or reposition during fights

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on farming efficiently in the jungle. Prioritize buffs, especially the blue buff, to maintain energy. Avoid unnecessary fights and rotate only when necessary.
Once you unlock your ultimate, start looking for pick-offs on isolated enemies. Use walls for mobility and escape. Secure objectives like Turtle and invade the enemy jungle if ahead.
Target enemy backlines, especially squishy heroes. Time your ultimate wisely to avoid crowd control. Split-pushing can be an option if your team lacks wave clear.

emblems.emblem_desc: "I chose this emblem set for Ling to maximize his mobility, sustain, and burst damage. The Fatal talent increases his Critical Chance and Critical Damage, making his attacks more lethal. Seasoned Hunter boosts jungle efficiency, helping Ling farm faster and gain an early-game advantage. Lastly, Killing Spree provides HP regeneration and movement speed upon securing a kill, allowing Ling to continuously dive in and out of fights. This setup enhances his assassin playstyle, ensuring he can eliminate key targets quickly while maintaining high mobility and survivability."

equips.equip_desc: This build makes Ling strong. It gives speed, crit damage, true damage, armor penetration, and a second life. It helps Ling kill fast and survive longer.

hero.hero_overview: Ling is a highly agile assassin known for his ability to traverse walls with his skill Finch Poise, making him one of the most mobile heroes in the game. He excels at split-pushing, assassinations, and quickly escaping danger. His ultimate, Tempest of Blades, grants invincibility and crowd control, making him a deadly force in team fights.
hero.hero_strength:
High Mobility: Can move across walls, making him hard to catch.

Strong Burst Damage: Can eliminate squishy enemies instantly.

Ultimate Grants Invulnerability: Tempest of Blades provides survival and crowd control.

Fast Jungle Clear: Can farm efficiently and contest buffs easily.
hero.hero_weakness:
Weak Early Game: Requires items to be effective.

Energy Dependent: Needs Blue Buff for sustained fights.

Vulnerable to CC: Can be shut down by stuns and silences.

High Skill Cap: Requires good map awareness and mechanical skill.

data.recommend: This guide provides an optimized build and strategy for Ling, focusing on maximizing his burst damage and mobility. It includes the best emblem, battle spell, and item choices to dominate the battlefi

spell.spell_desc: "Retribution is the best spell for Ling because it helps him farm faster and secure jungle objectives. It increases Creep rewards and reduces jungle damage, allowing Ling to scale quickly. Use it to secure buffs, steal enemy jungle, and take Turtle or Lord efficiently."

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Karena ulti ling dapat membatalkan ulti amon, sehingga pergerakan ling menjadi lebih leluasa.

counters.counter_desc: salah satu counter ling yaitu hero dengan tipe burst damage seperti karina, dikarenakan hp dari ling itu tipis sehingga hero-hero burst dapat membunuh ling secara cepat.

dominants.dominant_desc: Dalam Fase early game kita hanya fokus mengambil jungle dan secepat-cepatnya harus melebihi level jungle musuh. Jika ada musuh yang mempunyai hp yang sedikit, bisa langsung membunuh musuh tersebut dengan catatan sudah mempunyai ulti.

Dalam fase ini kekuatan ling meningkat, karena hero-hero tipis seperti mage, core, atau maksman lawan masih belum membeli defend, jadi ini menjadi kesempatan untuk ling mendapatkan kill lebih banyak dan membuat musuh ketakutan.

Fase late game menjadi salah satu fase yang paling krusial, meskipun di fase early hingga mid game kamu snowball, jika kamu salah cara main ling di fase late game maka fase-fase sebelumnya akan menjadi sia-sia. Di fase ini kamu harus lebih berhati-hati karena semua musuh itemnya sudah hampir jadi, maka kamu harus pintar-pintar melihat map supaya kamu tidak gampang di gank. Untuk lebih bagusnya kamu usahakan ambil lord pertama sampai seterusnya, supaya semua tim kamu lebih pede buat end tower musuh.

emblems.emblem_desc: Untuk emblem menyesuikan dengan musuh, dapat seperti ini dan dapat juga berbeda. Akan tetapi umumnya hero Ling memkai emblem seperti ini.

equips.equip_desc: Ling itu membutuhkan item attack speed dan juga item critical untuk memaksimalkan damage yang diberikan, contohnya seperti ini. Immortal dapat diganti dengan Rose Gold ketika kamu dalam keadaan snowball (menang)

hero.hero_overview: Ling adalah salah satu hero jungle yang cukup gesit, setara dengan hero-hero assassin lainnya seperti fanny, hayabusa, dan lancelot. Meskipun ling akhir-akhir ini sedikit kena nerf, akan tetapi nerf tersebut tidak sampai membuat ling jadi tidak op (over power). Ikuti panduan ini supaya ling kamu dapat menyaingi hero jungle di meta sekarang.
hero.hero_strength: Ling bergantung kepada skil 2 dan basic attack untuk memberikan damage ke musuh, skill 1 dan ultimate hanya untuk survivability. Main ling itu harus lihat possisoning, dan menunggu skill ascape atau cc musuh habis baru serang.
hero.hero_weakness: Minusnya di ling yaitu ketika tidak dapat buff biru, karena hero ling membutukan banyak energi untuk melancarkan skill-skillnya. Serta ling juga kurang cocok apabila hero-hero musuh banyak cc-nya, seperti franco, minsithar, kaja, dan yang lainnya.

data.recommend: Simak cara berikut supaya kamu dapat bermain ling lebih maksimal

spell.spell_desc: Karena hero ling adalah hero jungle, maka dari itu spell yang cocok untuk dia yaitu Retribusi. Untuk mengambil objektif seperti turtle dan lord.

hero.hero_overview: Ling is a assassin with high mobility and its rotation should start from exp lane buff and support gold lane
hero.hero_strength: It has high mobility so that he can chase enemy faster and also has life steal which helps in team fight and also gives cc for a moment from his ult
hero.hero_weakness: It is low health hero so it can be countered by Eudora,kufra,minsitar,so be aware from those hero with high crowd control
